coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the 3-group, 170-node closure.
validation: Exact Blender topology and four-decimal bounds across fifteen cases covering pixelation (including the empty endpoint), crop with zero and rounded fillets, full-color mode, density/structure extremes, and HSV/contrast controls. Grid exposes Blender's point-domain UV field and Image Texture performs linear CLIP sampling of the packed queen-of-swords image. A reproducible Blender 5.1.2 Eevee fixture renders the packed authored material at 768x768. Direct Blender/source diagnostics establish planar Generated Z = 0.5, signed PCG3D arithmetic, and exact binary Greater Than nodes; WebGL now reproduces all three and applies a deterministic 4x4 footprint only to the rendered output. Aligned evidence improves to 0.9957 surface-mask IoU, 0.3028 binary-mask disagreement, 0.1742 pixel correlation, and 0.2985 luminance MAE; shader parity is still not claimed. The remaining mismatch is renderer sampling and possible per-fragment attribute/precision behavior.
